boyz.notes: Bad shooters (BS 5+), surprisingly tough (T5), scary up close (WS 3+ choppas at AP -1). The real default kit is slugga & choppa; we take the any-number shoota option so the shooting tutorial has dice to roll — the slugga is omitted ([PISTOL] isn't modeled) and the Boss Nob with his gear is omitted. Profile verified 2026-07-04: 10th-codex-current baseline (Wahapedia) confirmed unchanged by the official 11th-edition Faction Pack errata (June 2026).
